This plant is part of the genus Alinula, and it is native to Madagascar. The species name lipocarphioides refers to its similarity in appearance to the genus Lipocarpha. Alinula lipocarphioides is a relatively rare and endemic species. Its classification reflects its unique characteristics and its place within the broader plant kingdom.
